channel.title: Posts on Uno
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Uno

item.title: Journey from PHP to Go
item.description: Introduction PHP is the most popular language in the world, but there are some features that can make it look dated. One such feature is its lack of static typing and errors at compile time. Golang solves this by introducing static typing with type inference and compile-time type checking. In this article we will explore how Go compares with PHP and why you should consider migrating from PHP to Go if you have not already done so!

item.title: Succession Plan for Your Company
item.description: Whether you’re working with a new team or need to bring expertise into your organization, succession planning is essential to hiring employees who will thrive in your organization. In the tech world, this means finding employees that have the skills and passion to grow in your organization. Often, when we think about succession planning, we think about replacing an employee that is leaving. But what about hiring someone new? And what does that look like?
